/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libamr_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libamr_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/amr_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/amr_msgs/msg/detail/location__description.c.o CMakeFiles/amr_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/amr_msgs/msg/detail/location__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/amr_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/amr_msgs/msg/detail/location__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/amr_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/amr_msgs/msg/detail/status__description.c.o CMakeFiles/amr_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/amr_msgs/msg/detail/status__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/amr_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/amr_msgs/msg/detail/status__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
